creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2007-12-12 05:08:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ftp/lftp             Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  - Update to 3.6.1
  
  - Repeat --weak option to terminate the loop automatically when  
    exiting lftp.
  - ftp:use-stat-for-list is off by default.
  - Slot command fixed.
  - Fixed timeout handling in ftp.
  - French and Polish translations updated.
  
  PR:             ports/117978
  Approved by:    Yarodin <yarodin@gmail.com> (maintainer)
                  linimon, (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.121     +1 -1      ports/ftp/lftp/Makefile
  1.81      +3 -3      ports/ftp/lftp/distinfo
  1.4       +1 -1      ports/ftp/lftp/pkg-descr
